[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010111 4
1 0000000 a
2 1001000 2
3 1110100 4
4 1110110 5
5 0000110 2
6 1001000 2
7 0000100 1

01 10 1111111 a
12 21 1110111 6
23 32 1110111 6
34 43 1111111 a
45 54 1101100 4
56 65 1111100 5
67 76 1111110 6
70 07 1111111 a

35 53 0011111 5

71 17 1111111 a

61 16 1110101 5
72 27 1111111 a

37 73 1111111 a
